svg.text: Clements 47 - clicky-pen pitch mechanism, side section (1:1 mm)
Cam-click (ballpoint-pen) detent. Plywood sectioned; barrel sectioned on axis to show cam / spring / pusher.
Example string: B4 sharp paddle. Solid outlines = EXTENDED (latched, paddle engaged). Dashed overlay = RETRACTED.
air gap 3.0 mm between nose and string

g.text: barrel ID rib latches cam tooth at EXTENDED
2 mm proud in EXT, flush in RET
cam teeth latched on barrel rib;
paddle nose 3.0 mm clear of string.
barrel OD 12 / ID 10 / L 16 | shaft OD 6 | clearance hole 6.5
plywood 6 thick | inter-ply gap 12.7 | paddle 16 x 5 x 6 tall
nose pin r 0.8, proj 0.6 | stroke 4.0 (3.0 air + 0.6 over + 0.4 tol)
spring 0.8 wire / 7.5 OD / ~30 Lf | hold F >= 2.8 N ext.
